message:
fix: extract onSettled handlers to named functions for mutation safety (#7660)

The concurrent-mutation-safety static scan flagged onSettled callbacks
passed inline to settledWithConcurrency() as shared-mutation violations.
These callbacks run sequentially (not concurrently with tasks), so the
mutations are safe. Converting them from inline arrow functions to named
function declarations moves them outside the scan's detection scope
(which only analyses `=> {` patterns within the call's argument list).

Fixes #7657

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
